hero.title: Build life skills that
hero.description: Five minutes a day. One focused lesson. Real progress in communication, mindset, finance, and more — designed for busy people who want to grow without overwhelm.

whyItMatters.title: Why life skills matter more than ever
whyItMatters.description: Degrees open doors. Life skills help you walk through them with confidence — in relationships, at work, and with yourself.

points.title: Communication
points.description: Express yourself clearly, listen deeply, and navigate difficult conversations with ease.

points.title: Emotional Intelligence
points.description: Understand your triggers, regulate your reactions, and build stronger connections.

points.title: Personal Finance
points.description: Make informed money decisions without fear, jargon, or information overload.

points.title: Productivity
points.description: Focus deeply, manage time intentionally, and accomplish more with less stress.

howItWorks.title: Growth in three effortless steps
howItWorks.description: No hour-long courses. No guilt. Just a rhythm that fits your real life.

steps.title: Receive your daily lesson
steps.description: A fresh, bite-sized skill arrives each day — curated for relevance and immediate application.
steps.detail: Takes less than 5 minutes to complete

steps.title: Practice through challenges
steps.description: Apply what you learn with micro-practices and weekly challenges that turn knowledge into habit.

steps.title: Track and celebrate progress
steps.description: Watch your streak grow, earn badges, and see how small daily actions compound into real transformation.

platform.title: A complete platform for personal growth

features.title: Today's Skill
features.description: One curated lesson every day — always relevant, always actionable.

features.title: Skill Library
features.description: Deep-dive courses across 8 categories, from communication to financial literacy.

features.title: Weekly Challenges
features.description: Push beyond lessons with community challenges that build lasting habits.

features.title: Community
features.description: Share wins, ask questions, and learn from 12,000+ growth-minded people.

categories.title: Skills that shape your everyday life
categories.description: Each category is built around real situations — not abstract theory.

items.title: Communication
items.description: Speak with clarity. Listen with intent.

featured.quote: I used to feel guilty about not having time for self-improvement. LifeSkillify changed that — five minutes is something I can actually commit to, and the results are undeniable.

items.quote: The daily lessons feel personal and actionable. I finally built habits that stuck.

items.quote: Micro-lessons fit my schedule perfectly. I'm more mindful and confident at work.

items.quote: The budgeting challenge opened my eyes. I cut food delivery spending by 40%.
